title: Annual report: 500 families supported across 3 nations in 2024
description: This past year saw record engagement and outreach. Read our full impact summary...
body:
2024 was a defining year for Alta Gracia Missions. What began as a small ministry with a big dream has grown into a movement of compassion spanning three nations and touching the lives of over **500 families**. This report is a celebration of what God has done through the generosity of our partners, the dedication of our team, and the resilience of the communities we serve.

## By the Numbers
- **500+** families directly served through feeding, medical, and education programs
- **1,200+** children reached through youth and children's ministry
- **3 nations:** Philippines, Honduras, and Guatemala
- **12** local church partnerships established or strengthened
- **80+** short-term volunteers deployed
- **$248,000** raised and deployed for community programs

## Highlights from the Field
In the Philippines, our longest-running program continued to expand. We launched a new literacy initiative that now serves 340 children in weekly tutoring sessions, and our feeding program provided over 18,000 meals in 2024 alone. The opening of our community center in Cebu marked a historic milestone for the organization.

> "The numbers are meaningful, but behind every number is a name — a child who learned to read, a mother who found work, a family who sat down to a hot meal and knew they were not forgotten." — Leomie Sarabia, Executive Director

In Honduras, we partnered with a local ministry to support 80 families in a mountainous region with limited access to clean water and medical care. Alongside our partners, we organized two medical outreaches and helped fund a water filtration system that now serves an entire village.

## Looking Ahead to 2025
Our goals for 2025 are ambitious but grounded in faith. We are committed to deepening our work in existing communities rather than spreading thin across new ones. Key priorities include:
- Completing Phase 2 of the Cebu community center
- Launching a micro-enterprise program for mothers in the Philippines
- Growing our volunteer team to 120+ annually
- Expanding our medical outreach program in Honduras

None of this is possible without you. Every dollar you give, every prayer you pray, every trip you take — it compounds into something far greater than any of us could accomplish alone. **Thank you for being part of this story.**
